The park's history is closely tied to two primary Canadian transportation routes
Document 2: Yarmouth Castle is an artillery fort built by Henry VIII in 1547
The fortification remained in use through the 18th and 19th centuries
Document 3: The Sleaford Navigation was a 12.5 mile canalisation of the River Slea
Interest in restoring the canal began in 1972

topic.name: Tropical Cyclones in the United States
topic.description: This topic encompasses the formation, impact, and characteristics of tropical cyclones that have affected the United States, particularly focusing on their landfall, intensity, and resultant damages.

Document 1: Hurricane Audrey was an extremely destructive tropical cyclone which primarily impacted areas of the South Central United States in June 1957.
Damages from offshore oil facilities alone was estimated at $ 16 million.
Document 2: Tropical Storm Abby was an exceptionally small tropical cyclone that had minor effects across Southeast Texas in early August 1964.
Only two structures sustained damage in Matagorda, one being destroyed by a possible tornado.

Document 3: Tropical Storm Bonnie was a weak but persistent tropical cyclone that brought heavy rains to the Southeastern United States in May 2016.
The storm hung on to tropical storm strength for another day, before weakening into a depression late on June 4.
